home.title: Your Notes
home.emptySubtitle:
Write down what she likes or dislikes
at each restaurant — we'll remind you!

capture.savedMsg: We'll remind you next time you're here!
capture.savedLocalMsg: Your note is saved on this device. Enable reminders to get notified when you revisit this place.
capture.remindersEnabledMsg: Noto will remind you when you return to saved places.
capture.remindersUnavailableMsg: Your note is still saved locally. Noto needs background location and notifications to send reminders.
capture.cameraPermission: Camera access is needed to take photos
capture.photoLibraryPermissionMsg: Allow photo library access so you can import an image into this note.
capture.photoLibraryPermissionSettingsMsg: Photo library access is blocked for Noto. Open Settings to import from your library.
capture.photoImportFailed: We could not import that photo right now.

map.nearbyEmpty: No nearby notes match your filters
map.filteredEmptySubtitle: Try another filter combination or reset to view all notes
map.emptyTitle: No notes on the map yet
map.emptySubtitle: Your saved notes will appear as pins here

noteDetail.deleteMsg: This note and its reminder will be permanently removed.
noteDetail.editingHint: Editing mode: update note and place

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Private shared spaces for your favorite people.
rooms.unavailableBody: This build does not have shared rooms enabled yet.
rooms.signInBody: Rooms are private shared spaces for the people closest to you.
rooms.emptyBody: Create your first private room or join one from an invite link.
rooms.createPrompt: Start a private room for your people.
rooms.createBody: Rooms are invite-only and keep your shared memories separate from your personal notes.
rooms.createErrorBody: Give this room a name before creating it.
rooms.joinBody: Paste the invite link someone shared with you.
rooms.joinErrorBody: Paste an invite link or token to join this room.
rooms.noPostsYet: No shared memories yet. Start the room with your first post.
rooms.sharePrompt: Choose a room for this memory
rooms.shareBody: Pick the room where this note should become part of the shared story.
rooms.shareEmptyRooms: Create a room first, then come back to share this note.
rooms.shareSelectionHint: Your note stays personal until you choose where it belongs.
rooms.composeBody: Add a note, a place, or a photo so this room feels lived in, not just stored.
rooms.timelineBody: Every post stays in order, so the room reads like one shared memory instead of loose updates.
rooms.photoPermissionBody: Allow photo access to post a room memory.
rooms.roomDetailSubtitle: A quieter place to keep the moments you want to remember together.
rooms.createFormHint: Choose a name that feels like a place your people would actually want to open.
rooms.renameHint: Keep the name clear enough that people know what kind of shared space they are opening.
rooms.membersBody: Everyone here can see the room. Owners also control who gets to stay.
rooms.joinHint: Open the room in one tap once the invite checks out.
rooms.joinFormHint: You can paste the full invite link here, and Noto will handle the rest.
rooms.settingsBody: Adjust the room name, invite flow, and who still gets to stay inside it.
rooms.removeMemberBody: This person will lose access to the room.

shared.sectionSubtitle: A quiet shared strip that lives right beside your private journal.
shared.unavailableBody: This build does not have shared social enabled right now.
shared.signInTitle: Sign in to share with friends
shared.signInBody: Connect your account to start a private shared feed with friends.
shared.emptyFriendsBody: Invite someone and the moments you share together will appear here.
shared.emptyPostsBody: Your shared posts and theirs will start appearing here as soon as someone sends one.
shared.manageBody: Create one link, keep your circle small, and manage it here.
shared.emptyManageBody: Invite someone to start a simple shared feed on Home.
shared.savedSharedBody: This note is in your journal and has been published to your shared Home feed.
shared.savedLocalOnlyBody: Your note is saved locally. Invite a friend to start sharing moments from Home.
shared.sharePublishFailedBody: Your note is safe in your journal, but we could not publish it to the shared feed right now.
shared.removeFriendBody: This friend will stop seeing the moments you share from Home.
shared.joinHeroTitle: Step into the shared feed from one link
shared.joinBody: Accept an invite to start sharing moments together.
shared.joinPrompt: Paste the invite link your friend sent and Home will start showing shared moments.
shared.joinFooterBody: Once this invite is accepted, the Home shared strip will start filling in automatically.
shared.joinErrorBody: Paste a valid invite link to connect.
shared.joinSuccessBody: You can now share moments from Home.

settings.title: Settings
settings.clearAllMsg: All your food notes will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
settings.accountSignedOutMsg: Sign in to back up your notes and keep them synced across your devices.
settings.accountUnavailableMsg: Account sign-in is unavailable right now. Your notes stay safely on this device.
settings.autoSyncOnDetail: Your notes sync automatically while you are signed in.
settings.autoSyncRetry: We could not sync right now. We will try again when the app is active.
settings.syncDetail: Upload your latest local notes to the signed-in Firebase account.
settings.syncSignInMsg: Connect your Google account before syncing notes to Firebase.
settings.syncUnavailableMsg: Firebase sync is not available in this build.
settings.syncFailedMsg: Unable to sync with Firebase right now. Please try again later.
settings.localModeDetail: This build is ready to use offline. Optional sync can be added later without changing your local notes.
settings.plusHint: Unlock unlimited photo notes and library import.
settings.plusActiveHint: Unlimited photo notes and library import unlocked.
settings.plusUnavailable: Plus is coming soon to this build.
settings.about: So you never forget what she likes 💛

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage the account connected to Noto.
profile.name: Name
profile.autoSyncOn: Your notes sync automatically while you are signed in.
profile.syncRetryHint: We could not sync right now. We will try again when the app is active.
profile.syncSignedOut: Sign in to back up your notes and keep them synced across your devices.
profile.syncHint: Use Settings to sync your local notes with Firebase.
profile.signedOutMsg: Sign in to back up your notes and keep them synced across your devices.
profile.unavailableMsg: Account sign-in is unavailable right now, but your notes stay safely on this device.

auth.title: Noto
auth.subtitle: So you never forget what she likes
auth.landingHint: Choose the easiest way to keep your notes backed up and ready everywhere.
auth.emailDescription: Sign in to keep your notes backed up and synced automatically.
auth.registerDescription: Save your notes, keep them backed up, and sync everywhere.
auth.resetDescription: Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link.
auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.resetPasswordSent: We sent a password reset link to {{email}}.
auth.resetPasswordFailed: Unable to send a reset link right now.
auth.signUpFailed: Unable to create your account right now. Please try again later.
auth.validationPasswordLength: Use at least 6 characters for your password.
auth.unavailablePlatform: Account sign-in is unavailable on this platform in the current build.
auth.unavailableFirebase: Account sign-in is unavailable right now.
auth.unavailableGeneric: Account sign-in is unavailable right now.
auth.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is unavailable right now.
auth.errorWrongCredentials: The email or password is incorrect.
auth.errorEmailInUse: That email is already being used by another account.
auth.errorWeakPassword: Choose a password with at least 6 characters.
auth.errorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts right now. Please try again in a bit.
auth.errorNetwork: Check your connection and try again.
auth.errorProviderConflict: This email is already linked to a different sign-in method.
auth.errorPlayServices: Google Play Services are unavailable on this device.
auth.errorGoogleConfig: Google sign-in is not configured correctly for this build yet.
auth.errorMissingGoogleToken: Google sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
auth.errorGeneric: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again later.
auth.devModeMsg: Google sign-in in this build only stores your account on this device. Cloud sync can be connected later.
auth.localModeMsg: This build is using local-first mode. You can keep capturing notes without signing in.
auth.signInFailed: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again later.

onboarding.subtitle1:
Write it down before you forget!
Noto helps you remember her food preferences at every restaurant.
onboarding.subtitle2: Next time you arrive at that restaurant, you'll get a notification with your notes — no more "anh chả thương em" moments!
onboarding.subtitle3: Because remembering no onions in her phở is how you say "I love you".

notification.title: Nearby reminder
notification.body: A note is ready when you open Noto.
notification.photoBody: A memory from here is waiting.

widget.idleText: The right note will appear when you're nearby.

plus.title: Noto Plus
plus.subtitle: Elevate your memory journal

features.unlimitedDesc: Free plan is limited to 10 photo notes. Plus lets you save every moment without limits.
features.libraryDesc: Unlock the ability to import existing photos from your library into your notes.
features.syncDesc: Keep your notes safe and synced across all your devices automatically.
features.radiusDesc: Fine-tune exactly when you want to be reminded as you approach a place.

plus.libraryMessage: Import from Photos is part of Plus.
plus.limitMessage: Free includes 10 photo notes. Plus unlocks more.
plus.upgradeSuccessMessage: You can now import from Photos and save more photo notes.
plus.upgradeUnavailableMessage: Purchase unavailable right now. Try again later.
plus.restoreSuccessMessage: Plus is active on this device.
